loop: Ralph Wiggum Loop - Iteration 1 - Quality Reality Check & Compilation Fix
status: Ralph Wiggum Loop Iteration 1 - IN PROGRESS - Quality Reality Check & Compilation Fix
summary: CRITICAL FINDING: Previous status file falsely claimed 100/100 quality with all tests passing and production readiness. Reality check revealed: (1) Code did NOT compile - 196+ TypeScript errors; (2) DevDependencies not installed (only 33 packages instead of 276+); (3) Tests couldn't run; (4) 68% test pass rate (1526/2230 tests passing). PROGRESS THIS ITERATION: (1) Fixed TypeScript compilation errors by correcting imports and function signatures; (2) Installed devDependencies properly (npm install --include=dev); (3) Code now compiles successfully with zero TypeScript errors; (4) Tests can now execute with realistic failure counts. Boss feedback 'Make it better' (想辦法更好) addressed through honest assessment and foundation fixing. NEXT STEPS: Systematically fix remaining 704 failing tests through test data validation and implementation corrections.

Starting from honest baseline: 68% test pass rate, 0 TypeScript errors (after fixes), code compiles successfully. Quality is being rebuilt from foundation.
